posts.text: 🚨 Reports are swirling that @janetjackson and Jermaine Jackson are clashing after she saw the 'Michael' biopic 👀🎬, and @lorenlorosa has the latest on the Jackson family’s business. 🎤👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

posts.text: Rev. Pastor Jamal Bryant calls to end the Target 🎯 boycott after claims that the CEO has begun making effective changes and upholding 3 out of 4 demands. Local organizers in Minneapolis disagree and feel that the diversity and inclusion demands haven’t been met. Listen to Front Page News with @mimibrowntv.
